lex.bot.postfulfillmentstatusspecificati: Provides a setting that determines whether the post-fulfillment response is sent to the user. For more information, see [https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lexv2/latest/dg/streaming-progress.html

lex.bot.postfulfillmentstatusspecificati.Description: A list of conditional branches to evaluate after the fulfillment code hook throws an exception or returns with the `State` field of the `Intent` object set to `Failed`.
Specifies the next step the bot runs after the fulfillment code hook throws an exception or returns with the `State` field of the `Intent` object set to `Failed`.
Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond when fulfillment isn't successful.
A list of conditional branches to evaluate after the fulfillment code hook finishes successfully.
Specifies the next step in the conversation that Amazon Lex invokes when the fulfillment code hook completes successfully.
Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond when the fulfillment is successful.
A list of conditional branches to evaluate if the fulfillment code hook times out.
Specifies the next step that the bot runs when the fulfillment code hook times out.
Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond when fulfillment isn't completed within the timeout period.
